programmes.show_description: Lookin' For Love In Lumpy Places. Gabriel has a huge growth on his clavicle but is terrified of surgery. Karen has dealt with painful, scaly feet for 22 years with no diagnosis. S4, Ep1
The Incredible Bulk. Ruben is a personal trainer whose head growth has prevented him from seeing clients. Kaitlin has blue marks and scars due to long-term drug use. S4, Ep2
Octavia's Story. Octavia has been bedbound for nearly a year. But, with her best friend as her worst enabler, can she choose between old habits and a new life? S7, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Tale Of Two Dresses. Rachel struggles to find the perfect gown when the dress of her dreams is no longer available. Plus, bride Ellie falls in love with two fishtail styles. S3, Ep11

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Quirky Bride Show. Here come the quirky brides! Tensions rise when fashionista Annushka and her mum can't agree on a dress. Wacky bride Willow considers an understated style. S3, Ep12

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Over-Exposed Show. Amy wants a dress with sleeves but her entourage fall in love with a strapless gown. Plus, Ellie clashes with her mum over how much cleavage to show. S3, Ep13
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Karaoke Christmas. Mike dresses as Santa but feels more like the Grinch when he can't contain his frustrations over Molly's Christmas spending. S3, Ep10
Fish For Breakfast. In an effort to boost their chances of getting pregnant, Molly encourages Mike to join her in giving up caffeine and eating healthier. S3, Ep11
Carl Gets A Roommate. Mike risks losing his eyebrows when he starts construction on the basement for he and Molly, while Carl invites Samuel to move in with him. S3, Ep13
Cowboy Aerobics. Sheldon campaigns to become Dr. Linkletter's lab assistant. Georgie enlists the drama teacher, to help with a surprising business venture. S4, Ep10
A Pager, A Club. Dr. Linkletter pushes Sheldon to make friends with his fellow students, and Georgie gets a pager. S4, Ep11
A Box Of Treasure. Sheldon, Dr. Linkletter and Meemaw team up on a science experiment. Mary is jealous that Pastor Jeff and Brenda are spending so much time together. S4, Ep12
The Hot Tub Contamination. Sheldon accuses Amy of not following the bathroom schedule. Meanwhile, Howard and Bernadette's staycation is interrupted by hot tub interlopers. S10, Ep5
The Fetal Kick Catalyst. Feeling his baby kick sends Howard on a baby-items buying binge with Raj, Sheldon and Amy host a brunch, and Penny is invited to a sci-fi convention. S10, Ep6
The Veracity Elasticity. Amy fibs about repairs being made to her apartment. Later, they present an episode of 'Fun with Flags' in Penny's apartment. S10, Ep7
The Brain Bowl Incubation. A successful gene experiment leaves Sheldon excited to procreate with Amy. Raj is reluctant to reveal what his new woman does for a living. S10, Ep8
The Geology Elevation. A coworker's MacArthur Genius fellowship award leaves Sheldon stone cold jealous. Howard finds a remote-control Stephen Hawking action figure. S10, Ep9
Property Division Collision. A divide develops between Sheldon and Leonard when divvying up their shared belongings. Raj and Stuart battle to provide Bernadette the most help. S10, Ep10
The Birthday Synchronicity. While Sheldon and Amy celebrate Amy's birthday, Howard and Bernadette welcome their new Baby Wolowitz. S10, Ep11
The Holiday Summation. Sheldon and Amy visit Leonard and Penny for the first time since the holidays and share details about their terrible trip to Texas. S10, Ep12
The Princess And The Troll. Mike and Molly encourage Harry to take Victoria on a date for Valentine's Day, and everyone is shocked when she accepts. S3, Ep14
Mike The Tease. Mike studies male fertility and visits a clinic to ensure that his 'swimmers' are up to the task of starting a family with Molly. S3, Ep15
Molly's New Shoes. Molly enjoys some retail therapy and goes off on a shopping spree after Mike storms off over a disagreement and disappears at the mall. S3, Ep16
The Geezer Bus And A New Model. Sheldon refuses to ride in a car after getting into an accident with Meemaw. Meemaw is forced to take the church shuttle. S4, Ep13
Mitch's Son. When the IRS accuses Sheldon of making a mistake, he stops at nothing to prove them wrong. Meanwhile, Dale is forced to get a colonoscopy. S4, Ep14
A Virus, Heartbreak. Sheldon faces consequences after installing a pirated computer game. Mary and Meemaw take Brenda out for Girls Night, and George watches Billy. S4, Ep15
The Romance Recalibration. After a disagreement, Penny takes off for a spa weekend, and Sheldon plays peacemaker. Howard and Raj battle a noisy floor in the baby's room. S10, Ep13
Emotion Detection Automation. Sheldon tests an MIT invention, Leonard has trouble when Penny announces her brother's visit, and Raj seeks advice from old girlfriends. S10, Ep14
The Locomotion Reverberation. Leonard and Howard engineer a distraction for Sheldon to keep him from hindering progress on the guidance-system project. S10, Ep15
The Allowance Evaporation. Amy is incensed when she learns Sheldon has shared intimate relationship information, and Raj's father stops sending financial support. S10, Ep16
The Comic-Con Conundrum. Raj finds himself in a cash crunch and turns to Sheldon to help him. Meanwhile, Penny considers crashing the guys' annual Comic-Con getaway. S10, Ep17
Escape Hatch Identification. Leonard and Penny offer Sheldon's old room to Raj after he moves out of his apartment. S10, Ep18
The Collaboration Fluctuation. Raj moves in with Leonard and Penny, and a period of adjustment begins, while usually self-centred Sheldon shows surprising interest in Amy's work. S10, Ep19
The Recollection Dissipation. Sheldon is pushing himself with too many collaborations. Bernadette's maternity leave is running out, and she must face going back to work. S10, Ep20
Emma and Adam set up a seemingly perfect arrangement: no strings attached. But when a fling becomes a thing, can sex friends stay best friends?
Big Pop On Campus. Dr. Lee treats Reginald, who has a rare growth on the back of his head. Che'Re has a prominent bump on her face, and Juan has painful boils on his neck. S3, Ep2
Raw Meat Mass. Margarita is a matriarch who has been hiding her armpit lump from her family. Bradley has a concerning growth that looks like raw meat on his leg. S4, Ep3
The Never-Ending Keloids. Jeremy is a pastor with a hanging growth in an embarrassing location. Todd has a bump protruding from his forehead that is painful and humiliating. S4, Ep4
Robin's Story. Siblings Robin and Chris are both obese and already lost a sibling to obesity. Chris's son Garrett, already 600lbs at age 20, wants to lose weight. S7, Ep3

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Desire For Something Different Show. Frankie's after something out of the ordinary but can she get her mum on board? At her final fitting, Jodie's not sure she'll like her dress. S3, Ep15

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Princess Prevails Show. Kayleigh envisions a sophisticated look for her wedding, but mum wants her to look like a princess. And Stephanie desires the ultimate elegant gown. S3, Ep16

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Be True To Yourself Show. Former Miss Jamaica UK, Sanchia, wants a princess ballgown as fitted frocks remind her of her pageant days. Will she compromise to stay true to herself? S3, Ep17

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Everyone's An Expert Show. Lindi knows what she wants, but her persistent sister-in-law is determined to sway her decision! And, Ginny-May and her mum have a fashion face-off! S3, Ep18

St Patrick's Day. Carl and Samuel host a party in hopes of attracting some ladies. Meanwhile, Molly reveals secrets from her previous St. Patrick's Day excursions. S3, Ep17
Spring Break. Molly joins her sister on a Spring Break road trip to party with Victoria's friends from junior college, while Mike asks his boss for some overtime. S3, Ep18
Party Planners. Molly and Peggy try to play nice for Mike's birthday. Meanwhile, Samuel and Carl compete for the same woman. S3, Ep19
A Second Prodigy. Sheldon is at odds with Paige once again when she considers enrolling at East Texas Tech. Mary seeks the advice of June when looking for a change. S4, Ep16
A Black Hole. The Coopers discuss the possibilities of black holes and alternate universes when Dr. Sturgis comes over for dinner. S4, Ep17
The Wild And Woolly World. Missy's first heartbreak triggers a series of events that lead the Cooper family to the brink. S4, Ep18
The Separation Agitation. Leaving the baby in daycare proves to be tough for Bernadette, and geologist Bert digs up a girlfriend, but some colleagues think she's a gold digger. S10, Ep21

The Long Distance Dissonance. Sheldon's former admirer, Dr. Ramona Nowitzki, turns up while Amy is visiting Princeton, and the gang is extremely concerned. S10, Ep24

programmes.show_name: New: Dr Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programmes.show_description: Triangle of Death. Jason isolates due to a giant neck growth. Marisa dreads spider veins after surgery and Kobe hums to stay calm as a huge bump near his eye is removed. S1, Ep9

programmes.show_name: New: Dr Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programmes.show_description: Nurse Bumpy Head. Bryan's head bumps puzzle doctors. Chalamar hates her chest lump and Dr. Lee and Dr. Lyndsey help Devi regain her bikini body and confidence. S1, Ep10
Cyst Pits. Drag queen Tameru is covered in tiny clusters of cysts on his chest, arms and neck. He discovered his bumps over a decade ago and still doesn't know what they are. S4, Ep5
